# Terminal Blog Redesign Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Redesign kotlin.tw from a light Bootstrap theme to a Terminal/Cyberpunk aesthetic with split sidebar layout, amber + cyan dual accent, CSS custom properties, and Vanilla JS animations.

**Architecture:** All HTML is generated by `build-posts.js` at build time — editing HTML files directly is pointless since they get overwritten. The design lives in: (1) `assets/css/jekyllthemes.css` for all styles, (2) `assets/css/syntax.css` for code highlighting, (3) `public/js/terminal.js` for animations, and (4) the HTML template strings inside `build-posts.js`.

**Tech Stack:** Vanilla CSS (custom properties + animations), Vanilla JS (~50 lines), Node.js template strings in build-posts.js, Vite static build.

---

## File Map

| File | Action | Responsibility |
|---|---|---|
| `assets/css/jekyllthemes.css` | **Full rewrite** | All styles: reset, layout, sidebar, post list, post page, about, mobile |
| `assets/css/syntax.css` | **Full rewrite** | Dark syntax highlighting (monokai-style) for code blocks |
| `public/js/terminal.js` | **Create** | Typewriter effect on sidebar logo + glitch animation (zero dependencies) |
| `build-posts.js` | **Modify** | Add `generateSidebar()`, `generateHead()`, `formatPostDate()` helpers; rewrite all three HTML templates (homepage, post page, about page) |

---

## Task 1: Rewrite CSS — terminal theme

**Files:**
- Modify: `assets/css/jekyllthemes.css`

> No unit tests for CSS. Verification is visual in Task 7.

- [ ] **Step 1: Replace jekyllthemes.css with terminal CSS**

Overwrite the entire file with:

```css
/* ===== CSS Custom Properties ===== */
:root {
  --bg:           #0a0a0a;
  --sidebar-bg:   #080808;
  --border:       #141414;
  --amber:        #ff9500;
  --cyan:         #00d4ff;
  --text:         #c8c8c8;
  --text-dim:     #444;
  --text-muted:   #222;
  --tag-fg:       #005566;
  --tag-border:   #003344;
  --font-mono:    'Courier New', 'Courier', monospace;
  --font-body:    'Georgia', serif;
}

/* ===== Reset ===== */
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

html { font-size: 16px; }

body {
  background: var(--bg);
  color: var(--text);
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  line-height: 1.6;
  min-height: 100vh;
}

a { color: var(--cyan); text-decoration: none; }
a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
img { max-width: 100%; }

/* ===== Split layout shell ===== */
.page-shell {
  display: flex;
  min-height: 100vh;
}

/* ===== Sidebar ===== */
.sidebar {
  width: 160px;
  min-width: 160px;
  background: var(--sidebar-bg);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  padding: 24px 16px;
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100vh;
  overflow-y: auto;
  z-index: 100;
}

/* CRT scanline overlay on sidebar */
.sidebar::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(
    0deg,
    transparent,
    transparent 2px,
    rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10) 2px,
    rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10) 4px
  );
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 1;
}

.sidebar-inner {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  height: 100%;
}

/* Logo */
.sidebar-logo {
  color: var(--amber);
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: bold;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  line-height: 1.3;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
  text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(255, 149, 0, 0.35);
  position: relative;
  display: inline-block;
  visibility: hidden; /* JS reveals it via typewriter */
}

/* Glitch pseudo-elements (activated by JS adding .glitch-active) */
.sidebar-logo::before,
.sidebar-logo::after {
  content: attr(data-text);
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0;
  width: 100%; height: 100%;
  opacity: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.sidebar-logo.glitch-active::before {
  color: var(--cyan);
  clip-path: polygon(0 0, 100% 0, 100% 35%, 0 35%);
  transform: translate(-2px, -1px);
  opacity: 1;
}
.sidebar-logo.glitch-active::after {
  color: #ff3366;
  clip-path: polygon(0 65%, 100% 65%, 100% 100%, 0 100%);
  transform: translate(2px, 1px);
  opacity: 1;
}

.sidebar-version {
  color: #3a2800;
  font-size: 0.62rem;
  margin-bottom: 24px;
  opacity: 0; /* JS fades in after typewriter */
}

.sidebar-cursor {
  display: inline-block;
  width: 7px;
  height: 12px;
  background: var(--amber);
  vertical-align: text-bottom;
  animation: cursor-blink 1s step-end infinite;
  box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(255, 149, 0, 0.5);
}

@keyframes cursor-blink { 50% { opacity: 0; } }

.sidebar-section-label {
  display: block;
  color: #2a2a2a;
  font-size: 0.58rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
  margin-top: 16px;
}

.sidebar-nav-item {
  color: #333;
  padding: 4px 0;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  display: block;
}
.sidebar-nav-item::before { content: '  '; white-space: pre; }
.sidebar-nav-item.active { color: var(--amber); }
.sidebar-nav-item.active::before { content: '▶ '; }
.sidebar-nav-item:hover { color: var(--amber); text-decoration: none; }

.sidebar-divider {
  border: 0;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  margin: 16px 0;
}

.sidebar-tag {
  color: #2a2010;
  font-size: 0.62rem;
  padding: 2px 0;
  display: block;
}

.sidebar-bottom {
  margin-top: auto;
  color: #1e1e1e;
  font-size: 0.6rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
  padding-top: 16px;
}

/* ===== Main content area ===== */
.main-content {
  flex: 1;
  margin-left: 160px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 100vh;
}

/* Top bar */
.topbar {
  background: #080808;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 8px 24px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 0.65rem;
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 10;
}
.topbar-path { color: var(--text-dim); }
.topbar-path strong { color: var(--amber); font-weight: normal; }
.topbar-right { color: #1a3a3a; }
.topbar-right em { color: var(--cyan); font-style: normal; }

/* Content area */
.content-area {
  flex: 1;
  padding: 28px 32px;
}

/* Status bar (vim-style) */
.statusbar {
  background: var(--cyan);
  padding: 3px 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 0.62rem;
  color: #001a22;
  position: sticky;
  bottom: 0;
}
.statusbar-item { padding: 0 12px; }
.statusbar-sep { opacity: 0.4; }
.statusbar-spacer { flex: 1; }

/* ===== Post list (homepage) ===== */
.posts-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  gap: 12px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  padding-bottom: 14px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
}
.posts-title { color: var(--cyan); font-size: 0.74rem; letter-spacing: 0.06em; }
.posts-count { color: #1a3a3a; font-size: 0.64rem; }

.post-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  gap: 14px;
  padding: 10px 32px;
  margin: 0 -32px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #0d0d0d;
  border-left: 2px solid transparent;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: background 0.15s, border-left-color 0.15s;
}
.post-row:hover {
  background: #0d1117;
  border-left-color: var(--cyan);
  text-decoration: none;
}
.post-row:hover .post-row-title { color: #fff; }
.post-row:hover .post-row-date  { color: var(--text-dim); }

.post-row-idx {
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 0.62rem;
  min-width: 24px;
}
.post-row-title {
  color: var(--text);
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  flex: 1;
  transition: color 0.15s;
}
.post-row-tag {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 0.6rem;
  color: var(--tag-fg);
  border: 1px solid var(--tag-border);
  padding: 1px 6px;
  border-radius: 2px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.post-row-date {
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 0.62rem;
  white-space: nowrap;
  min-width: 72px;
  text-align: right;
  transition: color 0.15s;
}

/* ===== Post page ===== */
.post-meta-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 0.65rem;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}
.post-meta-tag {
  color: var(--cyan);
  border: 1px solid var(--tag-border);
  padding: 2px 8px;
  border-radius: 2px;
}
.post-meta-date { color: var(--text-dim); }
.post-meta-sep  { color: var(--border); }
.post-meta-readtime { color: var(--text-muted); }

.post-title-line {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  color: var(--text);
  line-height: 1.4;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
}
.post-title-prefix { color: var(--amber); margin-right: 8px; }

.post-divider {
  border: 0;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  margin-bottom: 32px;
}

/* Article body — readable serif */
.post-body {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.9;
  color: #999;
  max-width: 760px;
}
.post-body p  { margin-bottom: 1.2em; }
.post-body ul,
.post-body ol { margin: 0.8em 0 0.8em 1.6em; }
.post-body li { margin-bottom: 0.3em; }

.post-body h1,
.post-body h2,
.post-body h3,
.post-body h4 {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  color: var(--cyan);
  margin: 1.8em 0 0.6em;
  font-weight: normal;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
}
.post-body h2::before { content: '## ';  color: #1a3a3a; }
.post-body h3::before { content: '### '; color: #1a3a3a; }
.post-body h4::before { content: '#### '; color: #1a3a3a; }

.post-body a      { color: var(--cyan); }
.post-body strong { color: var(--text); }
.post-body em     { font-style: italic; color: #bbb; }

.post-body blockquote {
  border-left: 3px solid var(--amber);
  padding-left: 1em;
  color: var(--text-dim);
  font-style: italic;
  margin: 1em 0;
}

.post-body img {
  max-width: 100%;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  margin: 1em 0;
}

.post-body hr {
  border: 0;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  margin: 2em 0;
}

/* Inline code */
.post-body code {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 0.85em;
  color: var(--cyan);
  background: #0d0d0d;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 1px 5px;
  border-radius: 3px;
}

/* Code blocks */
.post-body pre {
  background: #0d0d0d;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-left: 3px solid var(--amber);
  border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
  padding: 14px 18px;
  overflow-x: auto;
  margin: 1.2em 0;
}
.post-body pre code {
  background: none;
  border: none;
  padding: 0;
  color: #ccc;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  line-height: 1.65;
}

/* Highlight wrapper div from syntax highlighter */
.post-body .highlight pre { margin: 0; }

/* ===== About page ===== */
.about-body {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.9;
  color: #999;
  max-width: 700px;
}
.about-body h1 {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  color: var(--amber);
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  font-weight: normal;
  margin-bottom: 24px;
}
.about-body h1::before { content: '// '; color: #3a2800; }
.about-body p  { margin-bottom: 1.2em; }
.about-body a  { color: var(--cyan); }
.about-body strong { color: var(--text); }

/* ===== Mobile ===== */
.mobile-header {
  display: none;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .sidebar { display: none; }

  .main-content { margin-left: 0; }

  .mobile-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    background: var(--sidebar-bg);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 12px 20px;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 100;
  }
  .mobile-logo {
    color: var(--amber);
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: bold;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(255, 149, 0, 0.35);
  }
  .mobile-nav { display: flex; gap: 18px; }
  .mobile-nav a {
    color: var(--text-dim);
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    text-decoration: none;
  }
  .mobile-nav a.active { color: var(--amber); }

  .content-area { padding: 18px 20px; }

  .post-row {
    margin: 0 -20px;
    padding: 10px 20px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 6px;
  }
  .post-row-date { min-width: auto; }
}
```

git commit -m "style: replace Bootstrap CSS with terminal theme (CSS custom properties)"

## Task 2: Rewrite syntax.css — dark highlighting

**Files:**
- Modify: `assets/css/syntax.css`

- [ ] **Step 1: Replace syntax.css with dark monokai-style colours**

```css
/* Dark syntax highlighting — monokai-inspired */
.highlight { background: #0d0d0d; }

.c   { color: #555; font-style: italic }  /* Comment */
.err { color: #f92672 }                    /* Error */
.k   { color: #ff9500; font-weight: bold } /* Keyword — amber */
.o   { color: #f8f8f2 }                   /* Operator */
.cm  { color: #555; font-style: italic }  /* Comment.Multiline */
.cp  { color: #555 }                       /* Comment.Preproc */
.c1  { color: #555; font-style: italic }  /* Comment.Single */
.cs  { color: #555; font-style: italic }  /* Comment.Special */
.gd  { color: #f92672 }                   /* Generic.Deleted */
.ge  { font-style: italic }               /* Generic.Emph */
.gr  { color: #f92672 }                   /* Generic.Error */
.gh  { color: #999 }                       /* Generic.Heading */
.gi  { color: #7ec8a0 }                   /* Generic.Inserted */
.go  { color: #888 }                       /* Generic.Output */
.gp  { color: var(--amber, #ff9500) }     /* Generic.Prompt */
.gs  { font-weight: bold }                /* Generic.Strong */
.gu  { color: #999 }                       /* Generic.Subheading */
.gt  { color: #f92672 }                   /* Generic.Traceback */
.kc  { color: #ff9500; font-weight: bold }/* Keyword.Constant */
.kd  { color: #ff9500; font-weight: bold }/* Keyword.Declaration */
.kn  { color: #ff9500; font-weight: bold }/* Keyword.Namespace */
.kp  { color: #ff9500 }                   /* Keyword.Pseudo */
.kr  { color: #ff9500; font-weight: bold }/* Keyword.Reserved */
.kt  { color: #66d9ef; font-weight: bold }/* Keyword.Type */
.m   { color: #ae81ff }                   /* Literal.Number */
.s   { color: #7ec8a0 }                   /* Literal.String */
.na  { color: #a6e22e }                   /* Name.Attribute */
.nb  { color: #00d4ff }                   /* Name.Builtin — cyan */
.nc  { color: #66d9ef; font-weight: bold }/* Name.Class */
.no  { color: #66d9ef }                   /* Name.Constant */
.nd  { color: #a6e22e }                   /* Name.Decorator */
.ni  { color: #f8f8f2 }                   /* Name.Entity */
.ne  { color: #a6e22e; font-weight: bold }/* Name.Exception */
.nf  { color: #a6e22e }                   /* Name.Function */
.nl  { color: #f8f8f2 }                   /* Name.Label */
.nn  { color: #f8f8f2 }                   /* Name.Namespace */
.nt  { color: #f92672 }                   /* Name.Tag */
.nv  { color: #f8f8f2 }                   /* Name.Variable */
.ow  { color: #ff9500; font-weight: bold }/* Operator.Word */
.w   { color: #444 }                       /* Text.Whitespace */
.mf  { color: #ae81ff }                   /* Literal.Number.Float */
.mh  { color: #ae81ff }                   /* Literal.Number.Hex */
.mi  { color: #ae81ff }                   /* Literal.Number.Integer */
.mo  { color: #ae81ff }                   /* Literal.Number.Oct */
.sb  { color: #7ec8a0 }                   /* Literal.String.Backtick */
.sc  { color: #7ec8a0 }                   /* Literal.String.Char */
.sd  { color: #7ec8a0; font-style: italic }/* Literal.String.Doc */
.s2  { color: #7ec8a0 }                   /* Literal.String.Double */
.se  { color: #ae81ff }                   /* Literal.String.Escape */
.sh  { color: #7ec8a0 }                   /* Literal.String.Heredoc */
.si  { color: #7ec8a0 }                   /* Literal.String.Interpol */
.sx  { color: #7ec8a0 }                   /* Literal.String.Other */
.sr  { color: #7ec8a0 }                   /* Literal.String.Regex */
.s1  { color: #7ec8a0 }                   /* Literal.String.Single */
.ss  { color: #7ec8a0 }                   /* Literal.String.Symbol */
.bp  { color: #999 }                       /* Name.Builtin.Pseudo */
.vc  { color: #f8f8f2 }                   /* Name.Variable.Class */
.vg  { color: #f8f8f2 }                   /* Name.Variable.Global */
.vi  { color: #f8f8f2 }                   /* Name.Variable.Instance */
.il  { color: #ae81ff }                   /* Literal.Number.Integer.Long */
```

## Task 3: Create terminal.js — animations

**Files:**
- Create: `public/js/terminal.js`

> `public/` maps to `publicDir` in vite.config.js (`publicDir: '../public'` relative to `root: 'src'`). Files here are served at `/`. So `public/js/terminal.js` → `/js/terminal.js`.

- [ ] **Step 1: Create public/js/ directory and write terminal.js**

```bash
mkdir -p public/js
```

Then create `public/js/terminal.js`:

```js
(function () {
  'use strict';

  function initTypewriter() {
    var logo = document.querySelector('.sidebar-logo');
    if (!logo) return;

    var fullText = logo.dataset.text || 'NICK\nBLOG';
    logo.textContent = '';
    logo.style.visibility = 'visible';

    var chars = fullText.split('');
    var i = 0;

    var interval = setInterval(function () {
      var ch = chars[i];
      if (ch === '\n') {
        logo.appendChild(document.createElement('br'));
      } else {
        logo.appendChild(document.createTextNode(ch));
      }
      i++;
      if (i >= chars.length) {
        clearInterval(interval);
        revealVersion();
      }
    }, 90);
  }

  function revealVersion() {
    var version = document.querySelector('.sidebar-version');
    if (!version) return;
    version.style.transition = 'opacity 0.5s ease';
    version.style.opacity = '1';
    setTimeout(initGlitch, 200);
  }

  function initGlitch() {
    var logo = document.querySelector('.sidebar-logo');
    if (!logo) return;
    logo.dataset.text = logo.textContent.replace(/\n/g, '\n');

    setInterval(function () {
      logo.classList.add('glitch-active');
      setTimeout(function () {
        logo.classList.remove('glitch-active');
      }, 180);
    }, 4000);
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initTypewriter);
  } else {
    initTypewriter();
  }
})();
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Commit**

```bash
git add public/js/terminal.js
git commit -m "feat: add terminal.js — typewriter and glitch animations"
```

## Task 4: Update build-posts.js — shared helpers + homepage template

**Files:**
- Modify: `build-posts.js`

> All three HTML templates live in this file. We add helper functions at the top and rewrite the `homeLayout` string. Post page and about page templates are handled in Tasks 5 and 6.

- [ ] **Step 1: Add helper functions after the existing imports/constants block (after line 34)**

Insert these three helpers after the `replaceJekyllVariables` function (after line 34 in the current file):

```js
// Format date as YYYY.MM.DD for display in post rows
function formatPostDate(date) {
  const y = date.getFullYear();
  const m = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const d = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${y}.${m}.${d}`;
}

// Derive a short tag label from post frontmatter
function postTag(post) {
  if (post.categories) {
    const cats = Array.isArray(post.categories) ? post.categories[0] : post.categories;
    return String(cats).trim();
  }
  if (post.tags && post.tags.length) {
    return Array.isArray(post.tags) ? post.tags[0] : String(post.tags).split(',')[0].trim();
  }
  return '';
}

// Shared sidebar HTML (activePage: 'posts' | 'about')
function generateSidebar(activePage) {
  const postsActive = activePage === 'posts' ? ' active' : '';
  const aboutActive = activePage === 'about' ? ' active' : '';
  return `
    <aside class="sidebar">
      <div class="sidebar-inner">
        <div class="sidebar-logo" data-text="NICK&#10;BLOG">NICK<br>BLOG</div>
        <div class="sidebar-version">v2.0.0 <span class="sidebar-cursor"></span></div>
        <span class="sidebar-section-label">// navigate</span>
        <a href="/index.html" class="sidebar-nav-item${postsActive}">posts</a>
        <a href="/about.html" class="sidebar-nav-item${aboutActive}">about</a>
        <hr class="sidebar-divider">
        <span class="sidebar-section-label">// tags</span>
        <span class="sidebar-tag">iOS</span>
        <span class="sidebar-tag">Swift</span>
        <span class="sidebar-tag">Kotlin</span>
        <span class="sidebar-tag">Go</span>
        <span class="sidebar-tag">DevOps</span>
        <span class="sidebar-tag">K8s</span>
        <div class="sidebar-bottom">nick@blog:~$<br><span style="color:var(--amber);opacity:0.2">█</span></div>
      </div>
    </aside>`;
}

// Shared <head> block
function generateHead({ title, description, canonical, extra = '' }) {
  return `
  <head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
    <meta name="google-site-verification" content="I1wY0q5Vjp-BbrClzbJe2Qvn1B3oGvhAwgnlqZuprEU">
    <title>${title}</title>
    <meta name="description" content="${description}">
    <link rel="canonical" href="${canonical}">
    <link rel="shortcut icon" type="image/png" href="/asset/favicon.ico">
    <link href="/assets/css/jekyllthemes.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <link href="/assets/css/syntax.css" rel="stylesheet">
    ${extra}
  </head>`;
}
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Add analytics read for homepage**

In `build-posts.js`, find where `adSenseHome` is declared (around line 207). Add one line immediately after it:

```js
const adSenseHome = fs.readFileSync('_includes/adSense.html', 'utf-8');
const analytics_home = fs.readFileSync('_includes/analytics.html', 'utf-8'); // add this line
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Replace the homeLayout template (lines ~215–254)**

Find the block that starts with `const homeLayout = \`` and replace it entirely:

```js
const homeLayout = `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-TW">
${generateHead({
  title: siteTitle,
  description: siteDescription,
  canonical: `${siteUrl}/`,
  extra: adSenseHome
})}
${analytics_home || ''}
<body>
  <div class="mobile-header">
    <span class="mobile-logo">NICK BLOG</span>
    <nav class="mobile-nav">
      <a href="/index.html" class="active">posts</a>
      <a href="/about.html">about</a>
    </nav>
  </div>
  <div class="page-shell">
    ${generateSidebar('posts')}
    <div class="main-content">
      <div class="topbar">
        <div class="topbar-path"><strong>~/posts</strong> — Nick's Technical Note</div>
        <div class="topbar-right"><em>${posts.length}</em> entries</div>
      </div>
      <div class="content-area">
        <div class="posts-header">
          <span class="posts-title">// POSTS.LOG</span>
          <span class="posts-count">— sorted by date desc</span>
        </div>
        ${posts.map((post, idx) => `
        <a href="/posts/${post.slug}.html" class="post-row">
          <span class="post-row-idx">${String(idx + 1).padStart(2, '0')}</span>
          <span class="post-row-title">${post.title || post.slug}</span>
          ${postTag(post) ? `<span class="post-row-tag">${postTag(post)}</span>` : ''}
          <span class="post-row-date">${formatPostDate(post.date)}</span>
        </a>`).join('')}
      </div>
      <div class="statusbar">
        <span class="statusbar-item">NORMAL</span>
        <span class="statusbar-sep">│</span>
        <span class="statusbar-item">posts/index</span>
        <span class="statusbar-spacer"></span>
        <span class="statusbar-item">UTF-8</span>
        <span class="statusbar-sep">│</span>
        <span class="statusbar-item">LF</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <script src="/js/terminal.js"></script>
</body>
</html>`;
```

> Note: the existing code reads `adSenseHome` and `footerHome` before `homeLayout`. The new template uses `adSenseHome` in `generateHead`'s `extra` param. `footerHome` is no longer needed — remove it or leave it unused.

> Also add `const analytics_home = fs.readFileSync('_includes/analytics.html', 'utf-8');` near where `adSenseHome` is read (around line 207), since we now include analytics in the homepage.

- [ ] **Step 4: Commit**

```bash
git add build-posts.js
git commit -m "feat: rewrite homepage template in build-posts.js — terminal split layout"
```

---

## Task 5: Update build-posts.js — post page template

**Files:**
- Modify: `build-posts.js` (inside `generatePostPage` function)

- [ ] **Step 1: Estimate read time helper — add after `formatPostDate`**

```js
function estimateReadTime(htmlContent) {
  const words = htmlContent.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ' ').split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length;
  return Math.max(1, Math.ceil(words / 200));
}
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Replace the `generatePostPage` function body (the return template string)**

Replace only the `return \`...\`` block inside `generatePostPage`. Keep the top of the function (date formatting lines) unchanged:

```js
function generatePostPage(post) {
  const dateStr = post.date.toISOString();
  const displayDate = formatPostDate(post.date);
  const readTime = estimateReadTime(post.content);
  const tag = postTag(post);
  const adSense = fs.readFileSync('_includes/adSense.html', 'utf-8');
  const analytics = fs.readFileSync('_includes/analytics.html', 'utf-8');

  return `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-TW">
${generateHead({
  title: `${post.title || siteTitle} — Nick's Technical Note`,
  description: post.excerpt || siteDescription,
  canonical: `${siteUrl}/posts/${post.slug}.html`,
  extra: adSense
})}
${analytics}
<body>
  <div class="mobile-header">
    <span class="mobile-logo">NICK BLOG</span>
    <nav class="mobile-nav">
      <a href="/index.html" class="active">posts</a>
      <a href="/about.html">about</a>
    </nav>
  </div>
  <div class="page-shell">
    ${generateSidebar('posts')}
    <div class="main-content">
      <div class="topbar">
        <div class="topbar-path"><strong>~/posts</strong>/${post.slug}</div>
        <div class="topbar-right"><em>${displayDate}</em></div>
      </div>
      <div class="content-area">
        <div class="post-meta-row">
          ${tag ? `<span class="post-meta-tag">${tag}</span><span class="post-meta-sep">·</span>` : ''}
          <span class="post-meta-date">${displayDate}</span>
          <span class="post-meta-sep">·</span>
          <span class="post-meta-readtime">${readTime} min read</span>
        </div>
        <div class="post-title-line">
          <span class="post-title-prefix">//</span>${post.title || post.slug}
        </div>
        <hr class="post-divider">
        <div class="post-body" itemprop="articleBody">
          ${post.content}
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="statusbar">
        <span class="statusbar-item">NORMAL</span>
        <span class="statusbar-sep">│</span>
        <span class="statusbar-item">posts/${post.slug}</span>
        <span class="statusbar-spacer"></span>
        ${tag ? `<span class="statusbar-item">${tag}</span><span class="statusbar-sep">│</span>` : ''}
        <span class="statusbar-item">UTF-8</span>
        <span class="statusbar-sep">│</span>
        <span class="statusbar-item">LF</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <script src="/js/terminal.js"></script>
</body>
</html>`;
}
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Commit**

```bash
git add build-posts.js
git commit -m "feat: rewrite post page template — terminal header, readable body, vim status bar"
```

---

## Task 6: Update build-posts.js — about page template

**Files:**
- Modify: `build-posts.js` (about page section, currently around lines 259–307)

- [ ] **Step 1: Replace the about page template and write call**

Find the existing about page block in `build-posts.js`. It starts with:
```
const aboutContent = fs.readFileSync('about.markdown', 'utf-8');
```
and ends with `fs.writeFileSync('src/about.html', aboutPage);`.

Replace everything from `const adSenseAbout = ...` through `fs.writeFileSync('src/about.html', aboutPage)` with:

```js
const adSenseAbout = fs.readFileSync('_includes/adSense.html', 'utf-8');
const analyticsAbout = fs.readFileSync('_includes/analytics.html', 'utf-8');

const aboutPage = `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-TW">
${generateHead({
  title: `${aboutData.title || 'About'} — ${siteTitle}`,
  description: siteDescription,
  canonical: `${siteUrl}/about.html`,
  extra: adSenseAbout
})}
${analyticsAbout}
<body>
  <div class="mobile-header">
    <span class="mobile-logo">NICK BLOG</span>
    <nav class="mobile-nav">
      <a href="/index.html">posts</a>
      <a href="/about.html" class="active">about</a>
    </nav>
  </div>
  <div class="page-shell">
    ${generateSidebar('about')}
    <div class="main-content">
      <div class="topbar">
        <div class="topbar-path"><strong>~/about</strong></div>
        <div class="topbar-right"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="content-area">
        <div class="about-body">
          <h1>${aboutData.title || 'About'}</h1>
          ${aboutHtml}
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="statusbar">
        <span class="statusbar-item">NORMAL</span>
        <span class="statusbar-sep">│</span>
        <span class="statusbar-item">about</span>
        <span class="statusbar-spacer"></span>
        <span class="statusbar-item">UTF-8</span>
        <span class="statusbar-sep">│</span>
        <span class="statusbar-item">LF</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <script src="/js/terminal.js"></script>
</body>
</html>`;

fs.writeFileSync('src/about.html', aboutPage);
```

> Also remove the old `let headerAbout`, `footerAbout`, `adSenseAbout` declarations that precede this block — they're now inline above.

- [ ] **Step 2: Commit**

```bash
git add build-posts.js
git commit -m "feat: rewrite about page template — terminal layout"
```

---

## Task 7: Build and visual verification

**Files:** none new

- [ ] **Step 1: Run the full build**

```bash
npm run build
```

Expected output ends with something like:
```
Generated 57 posts, index page, and about page
✓ built in Xs
```

If it fails: check the error. Common issues:
- Syntax error in `build-posts.js` template strings — find the unclosed backtick
- `analytics_home` not defined — ensure you added `const analytics_home = fs.readFileSync(...)` in Task 4

- [ ] **Step 2: Preview the built site**

```bash
npm run preview
```

Open `http://localhost:4173` and verify:

| Page | What to check |
|---|---|
| Homepage | Sidebar visible with amber logo; post list with cyan `// POSTS.LOG` header; rows have index numbers, tags, dates; vim status bar at bottom |
| Homepage hover | Hover a post row — left cyan border appears, title brightens |
| Post page | Sidebar shows `posts` active; topbar shows slug; `//` prefix on title; body in serif; code blocks have amber left border |
| About page | Sidebar shows `about` active; `// About` heading in amber |
| Mobile (< 768px) | Resize browser — sidebar hides, mobile header appears with amber logo and nav links |
| Syntax highlighting | Open a post with code — dark background, amber keywords, cyan builtins, green strings |

- [ ] **Step 3: Check browser console for JS errors**

Open DevTools → Console. Should be clean. Common issue: `sidebar-logo` not found — means `terminal.js` loaded before DOM; the `DOMContentLoaded` guard handles this.

- [ ] **Step 4: Commit if everything looks correct**

```bash
git add -A
git commit -m "build: verify terminal redesign — all pages rendering correctly"
```

echo '.superpowers/' >> .gitignore
git add .gitignore

- [ ] **Step 2: Confirm dist/ is in .gitignore**

```bash
grep 'dist' .gitignore
```

Expected: `dist/` or `dist` appears. If not, add it:

```bash
echo 'dist/' >> .gitignore
git add .gitignore
git commit -m "chore: ignore dist build output"
```
